ragstream/memory/ingestion/memory_ingestion_manager.py owns ingestion orchestration from active MemoryRecords through chunking into the memory vector store, including async scheduling and batch ingestion.

ragstream/retrieval/retriever_mem.py owns the memory retrieval orchestration and SuperPrompt write-back path for this UID, delegating vector search, lookup, scoring, compression, and synthesis to subordinate components.

ragstream/memory/compression/memory_active_retrieval_brief.py owns ActiveRetrievalBrief creation/update/skip/topic-shift routing, contributor merging, reducer/gate wiring, agent invocation, and returned pending-buffer state for this UID.

ragstream/memory/compression/memory_compressor.py owns retrieval-time episodic compression, query-anchor construction, disabled passthrough, query normalization, compressed runtime fields, and no-store-write behavior for this UID.

ragstream/memory/memory_merge_synthesizer.py owns evidence formatting, runtime_config loading, memory synthesizer agent call, output parsing, diagnostics, no-evidence skip, and failure fallback for this UID.
